List the available INFOSIGA-SP datasets

Source: R/dictionary.R
infosiga_datasets.Rd

Returns a small tibble describing the datasets that read_infosiga() can import, including their grain (what one row represents) and key columns.

Usage

infosiga_datasets()

Value

A tibble with columns dataset, description, grain and keys.

Examples

infosiga_datasets()
#> # A tibble: 3 × 4
#>   dataset   description                                              grain keys 
#>   <chr>     <chr>                                                    <chr> <chr>
#> 1 sinistros Traffic crash events recorded in the state of Sao Paulo. one … id_s…
#> 2 pessoas   People (victims) involved in traffic crashes.            one … id_p…
#> 3 veiculos  Vehicles involved in traffic crashes.                    one … id_v…
